characters.name: 수아
characters.body: A full-body silhouette of a Korean woman with an hourglass figure and a slim waist. She is captured from a side profile, wearing a tight-fitting long-sleeved top and a high-waisted mini skirt that emphasizes her body curves. Her posture is upright and confident as she walks, with one arm slightly back and the other forward. She has a glamorous body proportion with a voluminous chest and balanced hips, creating a soft yet structured silhouette against a neutral urban background.

characters.name: 지영
characters.body: A side-profile silhouette of a slim Korean woman with an exaggerated hourglass figure and a voluminous chest. She is walking forward with a confident posture, straight back, and elegant arm swing. She is wearing a tight-fitting black long-sleeved ribbed top and a short mini skirt that emphasizes her narrow waist and curved hips. The lighting is backlit, creating a high-contrast silhouette against a blurred urban architectural background.
characters.style: glamorous and alluring presence, captivating charm
